Title: Customer Login to Frontend (Token-Based) > User is locked by admin > Session terminated
Steps:
Step Description:
1. Customer logs into the storefront frontend (multiple browser as well)

2. Admin locks the customer account.

Expected Result:
System should:

Revoke all active access and refresh tokens for the user.

Prevent token reuse:

API requests with access tokens should return 401 Forbidden.

OpenIddict Tokens should be revoked.

Customer should be sign out and redirected to the login page on first interaction.
Steps (Expected Result):
1. System should:

Revoke all active access and refresh tokens for the user.

Prevent token reuse:

API requests with access tokens should return 401 Forbidden.

OpenIddict Tokens should be revoked.

Customer should be sign out and redirected to the login page on first interaction.
Steps (Step):
1. 1. Customer logs into the storefront frontend (multiple browser as well)

2. Admin locks the customer account.

Delete all active pods

Check certificate in DB
